name: Federal Pell Grant
eligibility: You'll automatically be considered for federal grant programs when you apply for financial aid each year.

eligibility: You'll automatically be considered for federal grant programs when you apply for financial aid each year.

name: State grants
eligibility: You may qualify for financial aid from your home state if you're a U.S. citizen or permanent resident.

name: Private scholarships
eligibility: You can apply for private scholarships on your own.

name: The National Scholarship Program
